discovery.title: Jellyfish videos reveal why science content sparks curiosity for some viewers
discovery.summary: It can be easy to get sucked into social media for hours on end. Funny, cartoony science videos may be especially interesting, but not to everyone, according to a recent study from the University of Georgia.
